cases.name: humaneval-style function synthesis
cases.prompt: Write a function max_pair_sum(nums) that returns the largest sum of any two distinct integers in nums.

cases.name: mbpp-style list transformation
cases.prompt: Given a list of strings, implement a function that returns only the strings containing balanced parentheses.

cases.name: bug fix with failing assertion
cases.prompt: Fix the bug in this function so the assertion passes: def clamp(x, lo, hi): return min(lo, max(x, hi)); assert clamp(5, 1, 10) == 5

cases.name: unit test generation
cases.prompt: Write pytest unit tests for a retry helper that backs off after transient HTTP 429 responses.

cases.name: algorithm explanation with code
cases.prompt: Implement breadth-first search for a grid maze and explain the time complexity.
